$comment: c28 D-CSUBSET-LOCAL-TYPE-DEFINITION: a BLOCK-SCOPED struct DEFINITION with NO declarator as a STATEMENT inside build() (the sqlite3.c:68508 walMergesort shape). `struct Sublist { int nList; int aList; };` defines in the block scope; `struct Sublist v;` resolves it; 30+12=42 across a non-inlined call. A file-scope `struct Sublist { int nList; }` (1 field) stays DISTINCT (decl-site identity) — a name-only merge would read .aList past the size-4 type and derail 42. Revert the optional init-declarator-list and it is a parse error (P0009). Release pipeline + all 4 targets.
